description: pub struct Settings with #[derive(Deserialize, Debug, Clone)]. Exercises the rust-core extractor's derive-attribute path where serde Deserialize generates implicit trait impls that don't appear in source.

contract.notes: Generic rust-core does NOT yet emit synthetic implements edges for derived traits — that would require a markdown-oxide pack entry. This fixture documents the gap; passing it requires the pack to add Serialize/Deserialize derive expansion.
